overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city during a heavy rainstorm at night. The player character navigates busy sidewalks and crosses intersections surrounded by towering neon-lit skyscrapers, digital billboards, and futuristic vehicles. The scene features dense urban atmosphere with reflective wet streets and pedestrians carrying umbrellas.

events.description: pedestrian in teal shirt passes closely by on the left side
approaching the intersection crosswalk with traffic signals overhead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk toward the intersection, passing a parked white sports car

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in teal shirt walking past the camera on the left
white futuristic sports car parked at the curb with black wheels

entered.detail: tall dark pole with illuminated yellow pedestrian crossing signal and green digital display
futuristic horizontal traffic signal structure spanning the intersection with glowing green lights
tall dark glass building with grid-patterned illuminated windows rising into the rain
massive building facade with vertical neon signage and reflective glass surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked futuristic city sidewalk at night. The camera moves forward past a sleek white sports car parked at the curb, approaching a pedestrian signal pole with glowing yellow crossing indicators. Tall glass skyscrapers loom on both sides, their windows illuminated against the dark rainy sky, while the wet pavement reflects the neon city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection crosswalk with digital advertising

events.description: futuristic silver and black vehicles drive through the intersection
reaching the opposite sidewalk and leaving the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection through the marked crosswalk, navigating among other pedestrians with umbrellas

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians with umbrellas waiting at the corner and crossing
futuristic silver sedan driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement displaying MARM BAY and HYDRO HOMINUM in pink and white neon
broad yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines painted on the wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the wide intersection crosswalk, surrounded by pedestrians carrying umbrellas against the heavy rain. Futuristic vehicles drive past on the wet streets as the camera approaches a large digital billboard advertising MARM BAY. The overhead traffic gantry passes overhead as the camera reaches the far sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with large digital advertisements and stairs

events.description: passing the DELAMAIN digital billboard with black and white styling
pedestrian in white suit walks ahead on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial sidewalk past illuminated storefronts, digital displays, and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in white suit walking ahead on the sidewalk
pedestrian with glowing purple umbrella walking toward the camera

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading up to a building entrance
large black and white digital sign displaying DELAMAIN text with stylized graphics
tall vertical digital display showing animated advertisements on the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along the commercial sidewalk, the camera passes large digital billboards including the prominent DELAMAIN sign. A wide concrete staircase leads up to a building entrance on the right, while pedestrians with colorful umbrellas share the wet pavement. The scene is dominated by glowing advertisements and the reflective surfaces of the surrounding skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban corridor beneath elevated highway with palm trees

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the elevated overpass structure
large concrete support column temporarily blocks the view of the street ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk passing under the elevated structure, with fewer pedestrians visible

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead under the overpass in the distance

entered.detail: elevated highway or monorail track with thick support columns and yellow structural beams
tall palm trees lining the left side of the street beneath the overpass

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a more sheltered urban corridor beneath an elevated highway or monorail structure. The heavy rain continues but is partially blocked by the overhead bridge. Tall palm trees line the left side of the street, and the concrete support columns of the overpass dominate the view ahead as the camera continues forward through the futuristic cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-drenched cyberpunk district, moving from an open, neon-lit intersection into a sheltered urban corridor. It begins on a rain-soaked sidewalk, gliding past a sleek white sports car toward a glowing yellow pedestrian signal as towering glass skyscrapers loom overhead. As the camera enters the wide intersection, it weaves through a crowd of umbrella-carrying pedestrians and passing futuristic vehicles, moving beneath a traffic gantry toward a massive digital billboard for Marm Bay. The scene then shifts along a commercial strip dominated by the glowing Delamain sign and wide concrete staircases, where the wet pavement mirrors the surrounding advertisements. Finally, the camera moves beneath the heavy concrete support columns of an elevated highway, where the rain is partially blocked by the overhead structure and the path is lined with tall palm trees.
